title: SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST invoice cap not atomic
description: count_pending_invoices and create_invoice are separate DB calls with no transaction. Two concurrent SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST calls from the same pub_id both read count=4, both pass the cap check (n >= 5), and both insert, leaving 6 pending invoices instead of the 5-invoice cap. Fix: wrap count + insert in a single BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction, same pattern as enqueue().
